title: Rotting Oranges
prompt: You are given an m x n grid where each cell is 0 (empty), 1 (fresh orange), or 2 (rotten). Each minute every fresh orange adjacent (4-directionally) to a rotten orange becomes rotten. Return the minimum number of minutes that must elapse until no fresh orange remains; -1 if impossible.
hints: Multi-source BFS starting from every initially rotten orange.
Track time per cell during BFS; the answer is the maximum time reached, or -1 if any fresh orange remains.
pitfalls: Returning -1 when there are no oranges at all (answer is 0).
Decrementing fresh count after rotting (avoid double-counting).
